title: Equality before law
text: The state shall not deny equality before the law or equal protection of the laws.
keywords: equality fairness justice equal rights non discrimination equal treatment law

title: Right to life
text: No person shall be deprived of life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.
keywords: life liberty dignity human rights survival protection freedom existence

title: Environmental protection
text: The state shall protect and improve the environment and safeguard forests and wildlife.
keywords: environment nature forests wildlife ecology protection sustainability earth

title: Fundamental duties
text: It shall be the duty of every citizen to protect the environment and promote harmony.
keywords: duty responsibility harmony environment civic responsibility society citizens

title: Prohibition of discrimination
text: The State shall not discriminate against any citizen on grounds only of religion, race, caste, sex, place of birth or any of them.
keywords: discrimination equality caste religion gender bias fairness rights

title: Abolition of Untouchability
text: Untouchability is abolished and its practice in any form is forbidden.
keywords: untouchability caste equality dignity social justice discrimination

title: Freedom of speech
text: All citizens shall have the right to freedom of speech and expression, to assemble peaceably, to form associations, and to move freely.
keywords: freedom speech expression liberty movement rights democracy

title: Right to education
text: The State shall provide free and compulsory education to all children.
keywords: education learning knowledge children school literacy development

title: Freedom of religion
text: All persons are equally entitled to freedom of conscience and the right to profess, practise and propagate religion.
keywords: religion faith belief freedom conscience spirituality rights

title: Welfare of the people
text: The State shall promote welfare by securing justice—social, economic and political.
keywords: welfare justice equality society development social economic fairness

title: Distribution of resources
text: The State shall ensure that material resources are distributed to serve the common good.
keywords: resources distribution wealth fairness economy justice society

title: Equal justice and legal aid
text: The State shall promote justice and provide free legal aid.
keywords: justice legal aid fairness equality law access rights

title: Village panchayats
text: The State shall organise village panchayats as units of self-government.
keywords: local governance villages democracy decentralization community

title: Living wage
text: The State shall ensure workers get a living wage and decent standard of life.
keywords: workers wages labour dignity livelihood employment rights

title: Weaker sections
text: The State shall promote educational and economic interests of weaker sections.
keywords: weaker sections equality upliftment social justice protection support

title: Public health
text: The State shall raise the level of nutrition and improve public health.
keywords: health nutrition wellbeing public health society welfare

title: Protection of monuments
text: The State shall protect monuments and places of national importance.
keywords: heritage culture monuments history preservation protection

title: Separation of judiciary
text: The State shall separate judiciary from executive.
keywords: judiciary independence law governance justice system

title: International peace
text: The State shall promote international peace and security.
keywords: peace international relations harmony diplomacy global justice

title: Forced labour prohibition
text: Traffic in human beings and forced labour are prohibited.
keywords: labour exploitation human rights slavery dignity freedom

title: Child labour prohibition
text: No child shall be employed in hazardous work.
keywords: children labour protection safety rights child welfare

title: Cultural rights
text: Citizens have the right to conserve their culture and language.
keywords: culture language identity rights heritage diversity

title: Right to constitutional remedies
text: Right to move Supreme Court for enforcement of rights.
keywords: justice remedies rights enforcement constitution courts

title: Right to work
text: State shall provide right to work, education and assistance.
keywords: work employment support welfare assistance rights

title: Humane work conditions
text: State shall ensure humane working conditions and maternity relief.
keywords: labour dignity work conditions maternity rights welfare

title: Uniform civil code
text: State shall secure a uniform civil code.
keywords: law uniformity equality civil code governance

title: Early childhood care
text: State shall provide early childhood education.
keywords: children education care development learning

title: Agriculture and animal husbandry
text: State shall organise agriculture and protect cattle.
keywords: agriculture animals environment sustainability farming

title: Right to property
text: No person shall be deprived of property except by law.
keywords: property ownership rights law assets security
